mapper.select: SELECT member_id, id, password, member_name, email, phone, nickname, role, status, total_xp, usable_points, current_level, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM members WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT member_id, id, password, member_name, email, phone, nickname, role, status, total_xp, usable_points, current_level, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM members WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT member_id, id, password, member_name, email, phone, nickname, role, status, total_xp, usable_points, current_level, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM members WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT member_id, id, password, member_name, email, phone, nickname, role, status, total_xp, usable_points, current_level, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM members WHERE nickname = #{nickname} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members (id, password, member_name, email, phone, nickname, role, status, total_xp, usable_points, current_level, created_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{password}, #{memberName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{nickname}, #{role}, #{status}, #{totalXp}, #{usablePoints}, #{currentLevel}, #{createdAt}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET password = #{password}, member_name = #{memberName}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, nickname = #{nickname}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, total_xp = #{totalXp}, usable_points = #{usablePoints}, current_level = #{currentLevel}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
